# JackpotKeywords

> AI-powered keyword research tool with real Google Ads data. Describe your product in plain English and get 1,000+ scored keyword opportunities across 12 intent categories.

## What JackpotKeywords Does

JackpotKeywords is a keyword research tool for small businesses, entrepreneurs, and marketers. Users describe their product or service in plain English — no keyword expertise needed — and the tool generates keyword opportunities using real Google Ads data.

### Key Features
- AI-powered keyword seed generation across 12 intent categories
- Real Google Ads search volume, CPC, and competition data (not estimates)
- Jackpot Score (0-100) combining volume, CPC, competition, and trends
- Ad Score and SEO Score for different optimization strategies
- 12-month trend analysis with seasonal detection
- Keyword clustering and intent classification
- Local keyword generation for geographic targeting
- CSV and Google Ads Editor export
- Budget Calculator with Google Ads forecast data
- Market Intelligence dashboard

### Feature Pages
- Competitor Keyword Research: https://jackpotkeywords.web.app/features/competitor-keyword-research
- Long-Tail Keyword Generator: https://jackpotkeywords.web.app/features/long-tail-keyword-generator
- Keyword Competition Checker: https://jackpotkeywords.web.app/features/keyword-competition-checker

### 12 Intent Categories
1. Direct / Head Terms
2. Feature-Based
3. Problem-Based
4. Audience-Based
5. Competitor Brands
6. Competitor Alternatives
7. Use Case / Scenario
8. Industry / Niche
9. Benefit / Outcome
10. Adjacent / Tangential
11. Seasonal / Holiday
12. Local / Geographic

### Pricing
- Free: 3 searches, no credit card required
- Pay-per-search: $1.99/search or $4.99 for 3-pack ($1.66/search)
- Pro: $9.99/month for unlimited searches

### How It Compares
- SEMrush: $140/month
- Ahrefs: $99/month
- SE Ranking: $44/month
- Ubersuggest: $29/month
- JackpotKeywords: $9.99/month (14x cheaper than SEMrush)

## URL
https://jackpotkeywords.web.app

## Contact
For questions about JackpotKeywords, visit https://jackpotkeywords.web.app/help
